title: Rebrand to Shoe Swapper, red/black/white theme, add negotiation tab, and trading hero image

requirements.text: Rename the app from its current name to 'Shoe Swapper' everywhere it appears — including the header logo in Layout.tsx, the page title in index.html, and any other branding references across the app. Update all copy to emphasize trading/swapping over buying and selling (e.g., 'Start Trading' instead of 'Buy Now', 'Swap' language throughout).

quotes: change the name to shoe swapper
focus more on trading than buying and selling

acceptanceCriteria: The header logo and site title read 'Shoe Swapper'
The HTML <title> tag in index.html reads 'Shoe Swapper'
CTAs and section headings use trade/swap language rather than buy/sell language
No references to the old app name remain

requirements.text: Retheme the entire app to a red, black, and white color palette. Replace all neon/electric accent colors (orange, green, etc.) with a primary red accent (e.g., #E11D48 or similar bold red), pure black backgrounds, and white text/surfaces. Update frontend/src/index.css CSS custom properties, frontend/tailwind.config.js color tokens, and all component classes consistently so the street-culture aesthetic is preserved but expressed in red, black, and white only.

quotes: change the colors to red black and white

acceptanceCriteria: Primary accent color is red; no neon orange, electric green, or blue accents remain
Backgrounds are black or very dark; text is white or light gray
Buttons, badges, borders, and highlights all use the red/black/white palette
Theme is applied consistently across Home, Marketplace, CreateListing, and Profile pages

requirements.text: Add a 'Negotiation' tab to the main navigation (Layout.tsx) and create a new Negotiation page/route. The page should allow users to send and view simulated messages to/from other users about potential shoe trades. Use mock/demo data for conversations (no real-time backend required). Display a list of conversation threads on the left and a message view on the right. Each conversation should reference a shoe listing by name. Messages should be stored in local component state or React Query cache.

quotes: Create a negotiation tab to message other users

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Negotiation' link appears in the main navigation header
The Negotiation page shows a list of mock trade conversations
Selecting a conversation shows a message thread referencing a shoe listing
Users can type and 'send' a message (appended to local state)
The page is styled consistently with the red/black/white theme

requirements.text: Add a trading-focused hero image to the Home page. Place the generated image (trading-hero.dim_1200x600.png) prominently in the hero section of frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx, replacing or augmenting the current hero banner background. Serve it as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/.

quotes: on the home page add a image of the trading

acceptanceCriteria: The home page hero section displays the trading image
The image is responsive and does not break the layout on mobile or desktop
Overlay text and CTAs remain legible on top of the image

constraints: Do not alter immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Keep all existing features (landing page, listing creation, marketplace, user profile) fully functional
Keep the overall layout/template structure intact — only rebrand and retheme
nonGoals: Removing or replacing the AI condition/authenticity analysis feature

required: Dynamic street-style scene of two people exchanging/trading sneakers in an urban setting, bold red and black color grading, high energy and premium feel (trading-hero.dim_1200x600.png)
